sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what kinds of products or trade categories the company works with and include a primary contact CTA.
Sortiment summary must describe concrete product areas or buyer needs, not vague claims about having everything.
Trust proof should focus on real signals such as delivery reliability, assortment breadth, supplier relationships or practical experience.
If customer-types is present, it should clarify which business customers the company serves, such as retailers, installers, resellers or industrial buyers.
Final CTA should invite contact or customer onboarding without implying instant online checkout unless that capability actually exists.
Sortiment intro must explain how the assortment is structured and who it is intended for.
Category list items must be concrete product groups, brands or supply areas rather than generic marketing labels.
Pricing content, if shown, must describe price models, minimum orders or quote logic honestly and should not mimic consumer retail pricing unless applicable.
A contact CTA should appear after the product overview to support quote requests or assortment inquiries.
Customer onboarding intro must explain how a company starts the relationship, for example by sending an inquiry, sharing company details or discussing needs.
Process steps must describe a realistic B2B flow such as contact, needs review, account setup, ordering and delivery.
If trust-guarantees is present, it must communicate real service commitments or support principles and not invent formal guarantees.
The page should reduce friction and answer practical questions rather than repeat general brand copy from the home page.
About story must describe the company's focus, market role or way of working in specific terms relevant to wholesale or agency trade.
Team should be included when real people or functions can be presented; otherwise the renderer may keep this section compact.
Trust proof should emphasize business credibility, continuity, supplier relationships and customer support without repeating every claim from the home page.
Contact info must include real contact channels relevant for business inquiries, such as phone, email and visiting or warehouse address when available.
If opening-hours is shown, it should reflect actual phone, office or warehouse availability.
Contact CTA should support quote requests, product questions and new customer inquiries through a clear form or direct contact method.
